cold_open.hook: Morgan Stanley just told CVS shareholders one thing after earnings beat—and it's not what the stock price thinks.

markets.macro_note: Chip stocks flying, defensive names stumbling—the market is choosing violence on consumer staples today.

big_story.story_title: Marty Makary Set the Conditions for His Own Downfall
big_story.angle: A public health figure's credibility collapse is a masterclass in how being right about one thing doesn't inoculate you against being dangerously wrong about the next—and how the internet remembers both.

quick_hits.angle: NVIDIA is 'unstoppable' in 2026 according to analysts who said the same thing in 2024, 2023, and 2022—this stock has commitment issues with the word 'correction.'
Lime is IPO-ing after years of being the scooter company that made cities hate scooters—this is the Crocs IPO of micro-mobility: everyone said it was dumb, then it worked anyway.
Trump official floating a gas tax suspension is peak 'borrow from tomorrow to feel good today'—fiscal policy as a TikTok trend.
SEC delays prediction market ETFs while Bitcoin funds wait in the same line—regulators are doing theater, and everyone knows it.

odd_thing.joke_angle: A dress made from 500 loaves of bread at an African film awards show is either the most sustainable fashion moment ever or a very expensive carb-loading strategy.

yesterday_callback.topic: Parker, the fintech startup that was supposed to kill traditional banking, just filed for bankruptcy—proving disruption
yesterday_callback.fresh_take: Parker's corpse is still warm and Lime is already IPO-ing—turns out the graveyard of failed disruption is just a pipeline to the public markets.

sign_off.callback_target: NVIDIA's 'unstoppable' streak—because nothing says 'unstoppable' like being stopped every 18 months and then rebranded as inevitable.
